Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV9direc.name: direction
Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV9direc.abstract: The direction of the call - inbound or outbound call.

Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV10isAr.name: isArchived
Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV10isAr.abstract: Tells whether the call is archived or not.

Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV4typeA.name: type
Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV4typeA.abstract: The type of the call - can be a missed, answered or voicemail.

Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV2id9cr.name: init(id:createdAt:direction:from:to:via:duration:isArchived:type:)
Structs/Call.html#/s:6Domain4CallV2id9cr.abstract: Creates an instance of Call with the given parameters.

Structs/Call.html.name: Call
Structs/Call.html.abstract: Entity which stores information related to a call.

Protocols/CallsRepository.html.name: CallsRepository
Protocols/CallsRepository.html.abstract: Defines a repository responsible for coordinating the data from different data sources for the calls.

Protocols/ArchivingCallUseCase.html.name: ArchivingCallUseCase
Protocols/ArchivingCallUseCase.html.abstract: Defines the use case for archiving and unarchving a call.

Protocols/ListCallsUseCase.html.name: ListCallsUseCase
Protocols/ListCallsUseCase.html.abstract: Defines the use case for listing calls.

Extensions/Notification/Name.html#/s:So1.name: callUpdated
Extensions/Notification/Name.html#/s:So1.abstract: Notificaion triggered after a Call in a CallsRepository gets updated.

Enums/CallType.html#/s:6Domain8CallTypeO.name: missed
Enums/CallType.html#/s:6Domain8CallTypeO.abstract: The call was missed by the user.

Enums/CallType.html#/s:6Domain8CallTypeO.name: answered
Enums/CallType.html#/s:6Domain8CallTypeO.abstract: The call was answered by the user.

Enums/CallDirection.html#/s:6Domain13Cal.name: inbound
Enums/CallDirection.html#/s:6Domain13Cal.abstract: The call is inbound - the user was being called.

Enums/CallDirection.html#/s:6Domain13Cal.name: outbound
Enums/CallDirection.html#/s:6Domain13Cal.abstract: The call is outbound - the user was calling.

Enums/CallDirection.html.name: CallDirection
Enums/CallDirection.html.abstract: The direction of the call (from the user’s point of view).

Classes/DefaultListCallsUseCase.html#/s:.name: init(callsRepository:)
Classes/DefaultListCallsUseCase.html#/s:.abstract: Creates an instance of DefaultListCallsUseCase with the given parameters.

Classes/DefaultArchivingCallUseCase.html.name: init(callsRepository:)
Classes/DefaultArchivingCallUseCase.html.abstract: Creates an instance of DefaultArchivingCallUseCase with the given parameters.

Classes/DefaultArchivingCallUseCase.html.name: DefaultArchivingCallUseCase
Classes/DefaultArchivingCallUseCase.html.abstract: The default implementation for the use case for archiving a call.

Classes/DefaultListCallsUseCase.html.name: DefaultListCallsUseCase
Classes/DefaultListCallsUseCase.html.abstract: The default implementation for the use case for listing calls.
